name: Netazepide
description: Netazepide has been used in trials studying the prevention and treatment of Dyspepsia, Hypergastrinaemia, Barrett's Esophagus, ECL-cell Hyperplasia, and Rebound Hyperacidity, among others.

interactions.name: Methadone
interactions.description: Netazepide may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Methadone.

interactions.name: Olanzapine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Netazepide is combined with Olanzapine.

interactions.name: Sodium oxybate
interactions.description: Netazepide may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Sodium oxybate.

interactions.name: Hyaluronidase
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Netazepide can be decreased when used in combination with Hyaluronidase.

interactions.name: Clozapine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Netazepide is combined with Clozapine.

interactions.name: Ambroxol acefyllinate
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Netazepide can be decreased when used in combination with Ambroxol acefyllinate.

interactions.name: Theophylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Netazepide can be decreased when used in combination with Theophylline.

interactions.name: Dyphylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Netazepide can be decreased when used in combination with Dyphylline.

interactions.name: Aminophylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Netazepide can be decreased when used in combination with Aminophylline.

interactions.name: Fosphenytoin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Fosphenytoin can be increased when it is combined with Netazepide.

interactions.name: Phenytoin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Phenytoin can be increased when it is combined with Netazepide.

interactions.name: Teduglutide
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Netazepide can be increased when it is combined with Teduglutide.
